columns.name: Timestamp
columns.description: Date and time when the record was generated

columns.name: DataSource
columns.description: Data source of the cloud events; possible values: Google Kubernetes Engine, Elastic Kubernetes Service, or Azure Kubernetes Service

columns.name: SubscriptionId
columns.description: Unique identifier assigned to the Azure subscription

columns.name: ActionType
columns.description: Type of activity that resulted from the policy enforcement operation; possible values: Audit, Deny, or Allow

columns.name: AzureResourceId
columns.description: Unique identifier of the Azure resource associated with the event

columns.name: AwsResourceName
columns.description: Unique identifier specific to Amazon Web Services devices, containing the Amazon resource name

columns.name: GcpFullResourceName
columns.description: Unique identifier specific to Google Cloud Platform devices, containing a combination of zone and ID for GCP

columns.name: Region
columns.description: The region associated with the Kubernetes cluster

columns.name: ResourceKind
columns.description: Type or kind of Kubernetes resource created or managed (for example, pod or deployment)

columns.name: AdditionalFields
columns.description: Additional information about the entity or event
